name: Rebirth
overview: Chu Qiao, a slave girl, is rescued by Yan Xun, the heir of Yanbei, forming a strong bond with him. However, as ambitions clash and trust is betrayed, Chu Qiao finds herself entangled in power struggles and a quest for justice. Amid political turmoil and personal sacrifice, she rises as a symbol of hope, fighting to protect her people and homeland.
